# Preface {.unnumbered}

Every major economic crisis of the past century was, in the months before it happened, declared impossible by the people responsible for preventing it.

In 1928, the president of the New York Federal Reserve Bank declared that "the Federal Reserve Act has put us beyond the pale of money panics." The following year, the US banking system collapsed in the worst financial catastrophe in modern history. In 2007, the US Treasury Secretary stated that the housing market had "largely stabilised." The following year, Lehman Brothers failed and $11 trillion in household wealth was destroyed. In 2021, the Chair of the Federal Reserve called inflation "transitory." The following year, inflation hit a 40-year high and required the most aggressive rate-tightening cycle in decades to contain.

These were not random failures of individual prediction. They were expressions of a structural problem with how economies are understood, managed, and communicated about. And they are the subject of this series.

**Economic Crises Explained** examines seventeen major economic crises spanning three centuries — their causes, their human cost, the policy responses they triggered, and the lessons that were absorbed, partially absorbed, or ignored entirely. Each crisis has a companion documentary episode on YouTube and a fully referenced chapter in this book.

---

## Watch the Series

```{=html}
<div style="margin: 2rem 0;">
  <div style="position:relative;padding-bottom:56.25%;height:0;overflow:hidden;border-radius:6px;">
    <iframe
      src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/eftN-1paKvA"
      style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;"
      allowfullscreen
      loading="lazy">
    </iframe>
  </div>
  <p style="margin-top:0.75rem;font-family:system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:0.85rem;color:#666;">
    Series introduction · 0:52
    &nbsp;·&nbsp;
    <a href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZdiqjR6mTJDI3-T2o-ZK6ycQl9AfJ65b" target="_blank" style="color:#1a56a0;">Full playlist →</a>
  </p>
</div>

<style>
.ep-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin: 1.5rem 0 2.5rem;
}
.ep-card {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  display: block;
  border-radius: 5px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid #e0ddd6;
  transition: box-shadow 0.15s, transform 0.15s;
  background: #fff;
}
.ep-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
}
.ep-card img {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 16/9;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}
.ep-card-body {
  padding: 0.55rem 0.7rem 0.65rem;
}
.ep-card-num {
  font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  color: #888;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
}
.ep-card-title {
  font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 1.35;
  color: #111;
}
.ep-card-years {
  font-family: system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #888;
  margin-top: 0.15rem;
}
</style>

<div class="ep-grid">

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZOD-uVHhqHA" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/ZOD-uVHhqHA/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The South Sea Bubble" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 1</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The South Sea Bubble</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">1720</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EkXC3367roM" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/EkXC3367roM/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The Long Depression" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 2</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The Long Depression</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">1873–1896</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f5wp8Q8g8Eg" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/f5wp8Q8g8Eg/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The Panic of 1907" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 3</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The Panic of 1907</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">1907</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mjnc1c7sTEM" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/Mjnc1c7sTEM/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The Weimar Hyperinflation" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 4</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The Weimar Hyperinflation</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">1921–1923</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4n8vXthEAPw" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/4n8vXthEAPw/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The Great Depression" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 5</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The Great Depression</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">1929–1939</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UzD4kmW3eOE" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/UzD4kmW3eOE/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The 1970s Stagflation" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 6</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The 1970s Stagflation</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">1973–1982</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W4wBi1Pw53g" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/W4wBi1Pw53g/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The Latin American Debt Crisis" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 7</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The Latin American Debt Crisis</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">1982–1989</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f2EuKHBETLg" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/f2EuKHBETLg/mqdefault.jpg" alt="Black Monday" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 8</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">Black Monday</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">1987</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B6wy0taYqHQ" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/B6wy0taYqHQ/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The Japanese Lost Decade" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 9</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The Japanese Lost Decade</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">1990–2000</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Oj2nrI4srQM" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/Oj2nrI4srQM/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The Asian Financial Crisis" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 10</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The Asian Financial Crisis</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">1997–1998</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eQ55LN3fqIQ" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/eQ55LN3fqIQ/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The LTCM Collapse" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 11</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The LTCM Collapse</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">1998</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oRlwT_PDYFc" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/oRlwT_PDYFc/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The Dot-com Crash" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 12</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The Dot-com Crash</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">2000–2001</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3yp3obZRM70" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/3yp3obZRM70/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The Argentine Crisis" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 13</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The Argentine Crisis</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">2001–2002</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8EBJcquPcy4" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/8EBJcquPcy4/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The Global Financial Crisis" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 14</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The Global Financial Crisis</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">2008–2012</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IuOSLf5BamM" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/IuOSLf5BamM/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The Eurozone Debt Crisis" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 15</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The Eurozone Debt Crisis</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">2010–2012</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=svPxpdVVHXM" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/svPxpdVVHXM/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The COVID-19 Economic Shock" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 16</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The COVID-19 Economic Shock</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">2020</div>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="ep-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JBCMd2Attq4" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://img.youtube.com/vi/JBCMd2Attq4/mqdefault.jpg" alt="The Great Inflation" loading="lazy">
    <div class="ep-card-body">
      <div class="ep-card-num">Episode 17</div>
      <div class="ep-card-title">The Great Inflation</div>
      <div class="ep-card-years">2021–2023</div>
    </div>
  </a>

</div>
```

---

Each chapter follows the same structure: what happened, what the numbers show, what it did to people's lives, how it was resolved, and what — if anything — we learned. The emphasis throughout is on the quantifiable: the GDP collapses, the unemployment surges, the inequality shifts, the political consequences, and the sociological transformations that economic crises leave in their wake.

The series is not partisan. It is not prescriptive about which economic school has the right answers. It is an attempt to look honestly at the record of economic management — the successes, the failures, and the recurring patterns that connect crises separated by decades — and to draw from that record conclusions that are grounded in evidence rather than ideology.

---

*Algimantas K.*
*2026*
